text: "Honestly, the thing I care most about is finding the real story — not a manufactured tearjerker, but an authentic moment that shows what's actually happening on the ground. I want donors to feel something genuine without feeling manipulated, so I'm always looking for that balance between warmth and professionalism. And no matter how moving the story is, there has to be a clear, specific ask at the end — I've seen too many beautiful newsletters that leave readers inspired but with no idea what to do next."
